response.justification: Strong fullstack background with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct hits on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Git. Recent re:cinq role explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Solid testing/TDD culture (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, TDD at RIDE Capital). Gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, no Kotlin, limited cloud breadth (AWS CDK only), and currently in a career gap since October 2025.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP experience at re:cinq aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Deep fullstack track record across TypeScript/Node.js/React with TDD and testing-first culture
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) with infrastructure and DevOps exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
No Kotlin experience for the secondary backend stack
Career gap since October 2025 and short 6-month tenure at most recent role
